title: Packs Purchased for Carrier
query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM CarrierModulePack WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate
detailQuery: SELECT PackTheme AS label, COUNT(*) AS value FROM CarrierModulePack WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate GROUP BY PackTheme UNION ALL SELECT PackTheme AS label, COUNT(*) AS value FROM CarrierShipPack WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate GROUP BY PackTheme ORDER BY value DESC

details.text: {total} module/ship pack(s) purchased for the carrier during the report period. What you stock defines what your carrier offers the galaxy — a module-heavy carrier caters to engineers passing through while a ship-focused carrier is a mobile shipyard serving commanders who need a new hull in the field.
details.help: CarrierModulePack and CarrierShipPack each track outfitting inventory additions. total drives the title as the combined pack acquisition count.

tagLines: Fleet carrier inventory pack acquisition log compiled. Carrier outfitting catalogue updated.
Every pack stocked is a service offered to whoever docks at your carrier. You decided what that looks like.
A well-stocked carrier attracts visitors. The pack list is your service menu for the exploring masses.
